scene_a_text: The boat put in before the light failed. Rawn helped secure the line and said nothing more to the captain than was required. He was already thinking past the landing.
scene_b_text: The city received them without ceremony. Rawn moved through the lower ward quickly, Amicae half a step behind, and they were at the archive steps before the watch shifted. She had the key ready.

packet_metadata.case_purpose: Test restraint against brisk but valid pacing. The transition is compressed — docking to city to archive steps — but reads as purposeful and within normal narrative compression. A restrained model should not invent a gap.
